title: Client Facing Project Manager
required_skills: 2+ years client-facing project management / consulting / client success
Translating complex technical deliverables into business value
Exceptional written and verbal English communication
matched_skills: C-suite reporting & stakeholder management (HSBC: USD 8M programme, 6 workstreams)
Translating technical deliverables into business language (data storytelling, KPI reporting)
4+ years international project management / PMO experience
missing_skills: US timezone availability (CET is 6-9 hours ahead of PST/EST — critical gap)
Legal technology or law firm experience (no exposure)
Direct client-facing consulting / client success role title
US law firm or professional services sector knowledge
core_responsibilities: Primary point of contact for law firm leadership across active engagements
Run executive meetings, manage expectations, surface risks early
Communicate business value of technical deliverables to non-technical clients
Work closely with Legal Engineers to translate sprint outcomes into client-facing language
Manage multiple client engagements simultaneously in a fast-paced startup environment
key_requirements: 2+ years client-facing PM / consulting / client success
C-suite and senior stakeholder relationship management
cv_highlights: PMO at HSBC: managed USD 8M programme with C-suite reporting across 6 workstreams
Project Coordination at Hapag-Lloyd: Agile sprint delivery, KPI reporting, stakeholder management
Power BI certified — supports data storytelling and client-facing reporting
Multilingual (English, German, Chinese, Cantonese) — international communication strength
gaps: US timezone: Germany CET is UTC+1/+2, PST/EST is UTC-8/-5 — 6 to 9 hours difference is a hard constraint explicitly flagged in JD
No legal technology or US law firm experience whatsoever
No prior role titled 'client success' or 'consulting' — PMO/coordination experience is adjacent but not direct
Startup culture fit: Swans is a legal tech startup seeking operators comfortable with ambiguity at small scale
recommended_emphasis: Lead with C-suite stakeholder management at HSBC (closest match to 'managing law firm founders/partners')
Emphasise translating technical deliverables for non-technical audiences — draw from Hapag-Lloyd KPI reporting
Highlight proactivity and risk escalation experience to address the 'self-directed' requirement
Address timezone gap transparently if applying — early morning CET availability could partially overlap EST
recommendation: WEAK FIT — Do not prioritise. Match score 42/100. Core skills in stakeholder management and technical translation align, but two critical blockers exist: (1) US timezone overlap is explicitly preferred and Germany-based candidates face a 6-9 hour gap; (2) zero legal technology or US law firm experience. The role is also at a small legal tech startup, which is a different environment from HSBC/Hapag-Lloyd enterprise contexts. Recommend deprioritising unless Boru can demonstrate flexible early-morning availability and has a specific interest in legal tech.
